description: Set in prestigious Shaughnessy, this stunning 4-bedroom townhome offers an exceptional blend of style, comfort, & functionality. Beautifully curated by Mullo Interiors & thoughtfully designed across two spacious levels, the light-filled open-concept main floor showcases wide-plank hardwood floors, over height ceilings, custom millwork, & built-in bench seating. The chef’s kitchen impresses with quartz countertops, a large island, premium Wolf appliances, & a built-in coffee maker for daily indulgence. Seamlessly connected living & dining areas are ideal for everyday living & entertaining. Upstairs, the serene primary retreat includes a spa-inspired ensuite, plus three additional bedrooms. Enjoy A/C, a private fenced yard & the convenience of a one-car garage. Ready to welcome you home.
